sentences.arabic: قَرَأَتْ شَهَادُ الْإِعْلَانَ عَنْ وَظِيفَةٍ فِي مَكْتَبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Šehad je pročitala oglas za posao u biblioteci.
sentences.translationEn: Shahad read a job advertisement in a library.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَتْ طَلَبًا وَأَرْسَلَتْهُ عَبْرَ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Napisala je prijavu i poslala je putem e-maila.
sentences.translationEn: She wrote an application and sent it via email.

sentences.arabic: اتَّصَلُوا بِهَا بَعْدَ يَوْمَيْنِ وَطَلَبُوا مِنْهَا الْحُضُورَ.
sentences.translation: Nazvali su je nakon dva dana i pozvali je da doðe.
sentences.translationEn: They called her after two days and asked her to come.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى الْمَقَابَلَةِ وَأَجَابَتْ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Otišla je na intervju i samopouzdano odgovorila na pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: She went to the interview and answered the questions with confidence.
